name: epd-ite8951-gdep133ut3-esp32s3-driver
description: C++ E-Ink driver for GDEP133UT3 (GoodDisplay, 13.3, 1600x1200) & IT8951 (DEJA-TC103) controller on ESP32-S3. Supports PSRAM framebuffering, full 16-level grayscale, fast partial updates, and on-the-fly TrueType (TTF) font rendering via LittleFS. Requires PSRAM.
keywords: e-ink, gdep133ut3, epaper, it8951, esp32-s3, display, graphics, ttf, truetype
